title: thouinia striata var. striata
intro: Thouinia striata var. striata, also known as the striated thouinia or striated thouin, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Thouinia striata var. striata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
